amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 2 — paragraph 1 — point c a (new)
parliament_text:
(ca) providers placing on the market or putting into service AI systems referred to in Article 5 outside the Union where the provider or distributor of such systems is located within the Union;

providers placing on the market or putting into service AI systems referred to in Article 5 outside the Union where the provider or distributor of such systems is located within the Union;
